function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCRing all Badger-related bills into YAML frontmatter and deleting the completed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, read local AGENTS.MD files on entering folders, used OCR/migration/schema workflow docs, preserved original bill bodies, and deleted the inbox item only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Badger. The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/badger.md established Badger as the relevant system. The four purchase records read from 50_finance/purchases each visibly contained related_entity Badger and enough bill fields and line-item data to satisfy the bill schema in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so YAML frontmatter was added to those existing files while preserving their original bodies.
